description: Every requested count, aggregate, grouping, comparison, and unit in the output equals an independent computation over the concrete CSV fixture, including edge rows rather than a sample.
Quoted delimiters, escaped quotes, missing values, line endings, and malformed rows required by the task are handled according to the stated policy without shifting columns or silently dropping data.
The original input CSV remains unchanged unless the task explicitly asks for a transformed copy, and any generated result is valid in the requested format and location.
